title: Future Simple
objectives: Use the future simple tense (will/won't) correctly in sentences about technology
Produce short future predictions about technology and daily life using correct structure
Demonstrate understanding of future simple by completing grammar exercises accurately

key_concepts.explanation: We use the future simple to describe things that will happen in the future (we know) and to make predictions (we think). Form: Subject + will + base verb.

Affirmative: Subject + will + base verb. Example: Fahad will live in a smart city in the future. Negative: Subject + will not (won't) + base verb. Example: We won't forget our traditions. Yes/No Question: Will + subject + base verb? Example: Will people use robots at home? Answer: Yes, they will. / No, they won't. Wh-Question: WH-word + will + subject + base verb? Example: What will students learn next week? Where will people travel in the future?
Time expressions: tomorrow, soon, in the future, one day, in 2050, next (week, month, year). Prediction signals: I think, maybe, probably.

examples.problem: In the future, people ___ travel in flying buses.
examples.answer: In the future, people will travel in flying buses.

examples.problem: One day robots ___ help students in schools.
examples.answer: One day robots will help students in schools.

examples.problem: Maybe families ___ grow plants in space.
examples.answer: Maybe families will grow plants in space.

exercises.problem: Complete using will or will not and the verbs in brackets: 1. We ___ (not forget) to use technology wisely. 2. Noura and Maha ___ (travel) to London next summer. 3. Haya ___ (not be) late tomorrow. Her school starts at 7 a.m. 4. In the future, people ___ (use) flying buses to travel between cities.
exercises.answer: 1. won't forget, 2. will travel, 3. won't be, 4. will use

exercises.problem: Do as shown: 1. Farmers will grow plants in the desert. (Form a question) 2. Ali will work as a doctor when he grows up. (Make negative)
exercises.answer: 1. Will farmers grow plants in the desert? 2. Ali won't work as a doctor when he grows up.

exercises.problem: Future Vision Statement: Write 3-4 sentences starting with 'In the future…' using the future simple tense. Explain how people will use technology wisely to make life better for everyone. Sentence starters: In the future, people will…, We will use technology to…, This will help us to…, We won't forget to…
exercises.answer: Open-ended creative writing with Checklist: I used will/won't correctly, My sentences show responsible use of technology.

teaching_notes: Grammar lesson on Future Simple (will/won't). Grammar Box table with affirmative, negative, yes/no question, wh-question forms and examples. Time expressions and prediction signals listed. Think-Pair-Share with three futuristic pictures (flying bus, school robot, space farming). Practice: fill-in → transformation → creative Future Vision Statement. 1 page.
